abilities.name: Coffin Rigging
abilities.text: Salvage and repair actions in broken sectors produce sturdier field gear under your hands.

abilities.name: Mortuary Triage
abilities.text: When a wound is stabilized nearby, you can convert panic into procedure and hold the line together.

abilities.name: Grave Spark
abilities.text: Forge-led tests through dead infrastructure count as familiar ground to you.

abilities.name: Cold Brace
abilities.text: When escalation climbs from direct damage, your field braces keep the collapse from feeling immediate.
